title: London tube strike confirmed after last-minute talks collapse, 4 days of disruption expected
summary_full: London faces significant travel disruption as RMT union members strike for four days over a proposed voluntary four-day working week for Tube drivers. Talks between Transport for London and the RMT failed, leading to planned walkouts from May 19-22, impacting services and causing potential overcrowding on alternative transport.
